name: Noted
tagline: Lightning-Fast, Privacy-First Block Editor for the AI Era
description: Your notes stay securely on your local device — they never leave your computer. Built for developers and power users, Noted natively supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP), letting you safely expose your local notes to AI tools like Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible clients.

name: AIGrace
tagline: AI-generated music album about pain, survival, and hope
description: AIGrace is a raw, unfiltered journey through the moments we don't talk about: the ones we feel at 3 a.m., the ones we hide behind smiles, and the ones that set us on fire. From the forbidden ache of Flammable to the quiet hope of Rise And Love Again, this album maps human pain and the stubborn will to survive it.
